about.title: About Me
about.summary: Highly analytical Cybersecurity Engineer with over 10 years of experience bridging the gap between systems security engineering, software automation, and data-driven threat analysis. Proven expertise in writing secure code, building automated testing tools, and designing end-to-end security architectures. Adept at translating complex algorithmic logic into practical Python-driven prototypes for vulnerability assessment and digital forensics.

skills.items: Python, C#, PHP, Shell Scripting, Prompt Engineering, Pipeline Logic
Vulnerability Assessment, Penetration Testing, Code Analysis, Threat Modeling, Incident Response, SIEM (Splunk, QRadar), IDS/IPS
Network Forensics, FTK, Autopsy, The Sleuth Kit, EnCase, Hex View, Log Analysis, Event Correlation
Linux (CentOS/Ubuntu/RedHat), Windows Server, Azure, AWS, Oracle KVM, SQL, MS-SQL, HBase

achievements: Reduced cyber threats by 80% through advanced security measures.
Reduced downtime by 90% via proactive monitoring.
Achieved 100% compliance with ISO 27001, NIST, and GDPR.
Managed EHR, PACS, and HIS systems for multiple healthcare centers.
Enforced NABIDH/DHA healthcare regulations and secure backups.
Delivered IT operations and infrastructure support for the global EXPO 2020 event.

education.details: Focus: Advanced Cryptography, Digital Forensics, Network Security. Research: Automatic Analysis of Malware using ML & AI.
Core foundation in networking, systems, and telecommunications infrastructure.

footer.brand_desc: Innovative tech mind securing the digital frontier. Based in Dubai, UAE.
